problem id: f2a167e5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  01000110 -> 01011011
  11101011 -> 00100001
  11001100 -> 10110011
  01001100 -> 10111011
  10001011 -> 00100111
  01111101 -> 10001000
  11010001 -> 11000011
  00011001 -> 01001110
  11001101 -> 10000011
  01110001 -> 11001000

query: 00010011
predicted answer: 10101110
